meaning: 麦洛(公元前6世纪的希腊摔跤能手) ;n.[植]蜀黍
examples: Behind Nina's back, Milo made a face at Jamey.
At CTU, Milo gives Jack the news that Ellis' body was found.
Jack found Milo to be competent, though frequently naive.
He said the system exploited psychological techniques to make a person feel that Milo was real.
The demonstration showed the initial stages of the game, where players learn to interact with Milo.
